player_notes.jalen williams: Left Game 2 vs. Suns in the third quarter grabbing his left hamstring — injury status uncertain heading into Game 3. If unavailable or limited, significant boost to SGA usage and minutes for OKC bench players.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: In concussion protocol ahead of Spurs' Game 3 vs. Trail Blazers on Thursday — status being monitored per Shams. If out, massive negative impact on all Spurs props and positive impact for POR frontcourt/usage.

game_notes.OKC vs PHX: Jalen Williams (hamstring) status uncertain for Game 3 — monitor availability; if out, SGA workload and bench minutes increase significantly.
game_notes.SAS vs POR: Wembanyama in concussion protocol; Game 3 availability uncertain — if ruled out, Spurs rotation shifts heavily, boosting usage for remaining starters.
